channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander, Jokic play to a draw in back-to-back games between top MVP candidates
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Nikola Jokic, two of the favorites for the NBA's MVP award, showed why in a pair of exciting games on back-to-back days in Oklahoma City. Neither emerged as a clear favorite to claim the hardware.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sam Hauser becomes 4th Celtics player with 9 3s in a game as Boston keeps shooting from deep
item.description: Sam Hauser started in place of Jayson Tatum and did what he and the Boston Celtics have done all season — shoot a bunch of 3-pointers and make more than their share.
item.dc:creator: Brendan Mcgair, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Paige Bueckers and UConn are healthy and rolling as her final March Madness approaches
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers is in a class by herself in the Big East, becoming the first player to win the most outstanding player of the conference tournament three times.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Paige Bueckers scores 24 points and UConn wins 23rd Big East crown with 70-50 victory over Creighton
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored 24 points and Azzi Fudd added 13 to help No. 3 UConn beat 22nd-ranked Creighton 70-50 to win the Big East championship Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Olivia Culpo and Christian McCaffrey announce pregnancy with walk in a field
item.description: It doesn't look like Culpo and McCaffrey wasted much time starting a family after they wed in a lavish ceremony in June 2024 in Rhode Island.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the deal tells The Associated Press that the New York Jets and former Pittsburgh Steelers quarterback Justin Fields have agreed to a two-year contract worth $40 million.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: UCLA and South Carolina are 1-2 in women's AP Top 25; No. 6 TCU has highest ranking in its history
item.description: UCLA vaulted back up to No. 1 in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25 on Monday after beating USC for the Big Ten title over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke ends Auburn's 8-week stay at No. 1 in AP Top 25; Oregon, Illini return as postseason heats up
item.description: Duke ended Auburn's eight-week stay at No. 1 in the AP Top 25 men's college basketball poll on Monday, while the Tigers dropped to third behind Houston as all three programs began preparing for their conference tournaments.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Khalil Mack staying with Chargers. Deal is for 1 year, $18 million, AP sources say
item.description: Khalil Mack will remain with the Los Angeles Chargers after agreeing to a one-year deal on Monday. Mack's $18 million salary for the 2025 season will be fully guaranteed according to two people familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL offensive lineman turned broadcaster Craig Wolfley dies at 66
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Craig Wolfley, a former NFL offensive lineman who spent most of his 12-year career playing for Chuck Noll in Pittsburgh and later became a fixture on the Steelers radio broadcast team, has died. He was 66.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL Free Agency primer: Aaron Rodgers, Russell Wilson, Sam Darnold to make big decisions on next teams
item.description: The NFL's free agency negotiating window opens Monday at noon as several big players look to land their next contracts, including Aaron Rodgers and Joey Bosa.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history at $40 million per year
item.description: Myles Garrett is staying in Cleveland after the Browns gave him a record four-year contract extension that makes the four-time All-Pro edge rusher the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mater Dei Catholic 59, Carlsbad 52
item.description: Mater Dei Catholic winning and advancing to the Division III State Regional semifinals, 59-52 over Carlsbad,
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Raiders acquire quarterback Geno Smith from Seahawks for a 3rd-round pick, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders answered their most pressing personnel question of the offseason Friday by acquiring quarterback Geno Smith in a trade with Seattle and reuniting him with his former coach, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
